synthesized_reason: Phase A pass; Phase B surfaces a legitimate medium (XDG consumer wiring incomplete for preferred_specialists + cross_model.provider reader) plus false positives. The wiring gap is a follow-up enhancement, not a spec violation — AC-1 wires the config file and helpers; "every consumer uses the helper" is not in scope. Document as follow-up.

real_findings.note: XDG config consumer wiring may be incomplete: preferred_specialists field in ~/.config/furrow/config.yaml has no runtime consumer; cross-model review still reads project-local furrow.yaml only. Follow-up: audit every XDG config field for an actual reader.
SC2097/SC2098 in upgrade/promotion-target tests; SC2129 in install.sh. Minor.

false_positives: correctness: "rws state init never writes source_todos" — AC-6 specifies schema + /furrow:next handoff + back-compat; does not require rws init to accept --source-todos. Current impl matches the AC. Would be a future enhancement, not a spec violation.

spec-compliance: "XDG config is helper/scaffolding" — partially correct but AC-3 explicitly declares promotion-targets scaffolding-only; AC-1/2 do require runtime consumption and some of that is incomplete (see runtime-wiring finding above).

reviewers.phase_b_fresh_claude: skipped: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY absent; codex-only satisfies generator-evaluator separation via cross-model
